title: Music randomiser - discs
description: Adds most C418 music disc soundtracks to ambient music
body:
This pack is designed as an add-on to [Music randomiser](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/music-randomiser), but it could work without it too.

It adds most C418 music discs (except 11, 13 and ward) to ambient soundtracks. If used with the base pack, they will be twice as rare.
